name: Luca
current_focus: I am finalizing the guide on using the free Stackit.ai template to help founders build income generating agents. I am also integrating Navo into the finance management workflow to track earnings from the Skool community and AI Growth Engine. The goal is to create a seamless path from the free template to paid coaching.
